positioning_summary: NimbusCRM appears positioned based on extracted signals in pricing, features, and target-customer language.

key_differentiators.claim: Enterprise is annual contract only with SSO and audit logs.
API access is available only on Growth and above.
The new SMB plan starts at $19 per user and includes API support.

pricing_signals.claim: NimbusCRM offers Starter at $29/seat/month and Growth at $79/seat/month.
The new SMB plan starts at $19 per user and includes API support.
